observed_state: Candidates use setup hA/area/h/Ta/Tsur/emissivity and a Salt2-trained scalar only for prediction.
forbidden_runtime_input: validation/holdout temperatures, realized CFD wallHeatFlux, CFD mdot

observed_state: Salt2 realized external loss is used only to fit one scalar on the training split; Salt3/Salt4 realized losses are scoring targets only.
The no-loss form has existing M3 diagnostic scores but cannot remove a blocker whose requirement is a physical test-section heat-loss model.
The 37 W value is documented as an imposed source, not an admitted passive loss model.
Using realized external loss reproduces targets by definition and is retained only as an upper-bound diagnostic.
No existing Fluid/1D run couples these predicted test-section losses into an M3+TS mdot/TP/TW scorecard.
